tasks.title: Codex token-velocity dashboard with a hotkey-first overlay.
tasks.meaning_summary: Build a Windows-first background app that watches `C:\Users\gregs\.codex` for new and modified session-history `.jsonl` files, extracts token-usage telemetry from the live append stream, and renders a compact bar-chart view of token velocity over multiple time buckets.
